__inputs.name: DS_POSTGRES
__inputs.label: ASFA Postgres
__inputs.description: The read-only grafana_reader connection to ASFA's Railway Postgres

targets.rawSql:
SELECT m.date::timestamptz AS "time",
       SUM(COALESCE(m.calories, m.protein*4 + m.carbs*4 + m.fat*9)) AS "kcal",
       MAX(g.calorie_goal) AS "goal"
FROM meals m CROSS JOIN nutrition_goals g
WHERE $__timeFilter(m.date::timestamptz)
GROUP BY m.date
ORDER BY m.date

WITH daily AS (
  SELECT date, SUM(protein) AS p
  FROM meals
  WHERE date::date >= CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '6 days'
  GROUP BY date
)
SELECT ROUND(100.0 * COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE p >= (SELECT protein_goal FROM nutrition_goals LIMIT 1)) / 7.0, 0) AS "% days hit protein goal"
FROM daily

SELECT 'Protein' AS metric, COALESCE(SUM(protein),0) AS grams FROM meals WHERE date::date = CURRENT_DATE
UNION ALL SELECT 'Carbs',   COALESCE(SUM(carbs),0)   FROM meals WHERE date::date = CURRENT_DATE
UNION ALL SELECT 'Fat',     COALESCE(SUM(fat),0)     FROM meals WHERE date::date = CURRENT_DATE

SELECT date::timestamptz AS "time",
       duration AS "hours",
       quality  AS "quality (1-5)"
FROM sleep
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)
ORDER BY date

-- Mirrors database.score_readiness(): 100 minus duration & quality penalties
SELECT date::timestamptz AS "time",
       GREATEST(0, LEAST(100,
         100
         - CASE WHEN duration < 5.5 THEN 20 WHEN duration > 9.0 THEN 10 ELSE 0 END
         - CASE WHEN quality <= 3 THEN 15 WHEN quality = 4 THEN 5 ELSE 0 END
       )) AS "readiness"
FROM sleep
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)
ORDER BY date

SELECT date AS "time",
       SUM(total_volume_kg) AS "volume (kg)"
FROM gym_sessions
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT s.date::timestamptz AS "time",
       SUM(s.steps) AS "steps",
       (SELECT steps_goal FROM steps_goal ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT 1) AS "goal"
FROM steps s
WHERE $__timeFilter(s.date::timestamptz)
GROUP BY s.date
ORDER BY s.date

SELECT ses.date AS "date",
       e.name AS "exercise",
       gs.weight_kg AS "weight (kg)",
       gs.reps AS "reps"
FROM gym_sets gs
JOIN gym_exercises e  ON e.id  = gs.exercise_id
JOIN gym_sessions ses ON ses.id = gs.session_id
WHERE gs.is_pr = TRUE
ORDER BY ses.date DESC
LIMIT 100

SELECT category AS metric, SUM(amount) AS total
FROM spending
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)
GROUP BY category
ORDER BY total DESC

SELECT date::timestamptz AS "time",
       SUM(amount_ml) AS "ml",
       2500 AS "target"
FROM hydration_log
WHERE $__timeFilter(date::timestamptz)
GROUP BY date
ORDER BY date

SELECT
  SUM(amount) AS "month to date",
  ROUND(
    SUM(amount) / EXTRACT(DAY FROM CURRENT_DATE)
    * EXTRACT(DAY FROM (date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE) + INTERVAL '1 month - 1 day'))
  , 2) AS "projected month-end"
FROM spending
WHERE date::date >= date_trunc('month', CURRENT_DATE)

SELECT d::timestamptz AS "time", tbl AS "metric", cnt AS "rows" FROM (
  SELECT date AS d, 'meals' AS tbl, COUNT(*) cnt FROM meals GROUP BY date
  UNION ALL SELECT date, 'sleep',           COUNT(*) FROM sleep           GROUP BY date
  UNION ALL SELECT date, 'spending',        COUNT(*) FROM spending        GROUP BY date
  UNION ALL SELECT date, 'hydration_log',   COUNT(*) FROM hydration_log   GROUP BY date
  UNION ALL SELECT substr(taken_at,1,10), 'supplements_log', COUNT(*) FROM supplements_log GROUP BY substr(taken_at,1,10)
  UNION ALL SELECT date, 'steps',           COUNT(*) FROM steps           GROUP BY date
  UNION ALL SELECT date, 'gym_sessions',    COUNT(*) FROM gym_sessions    GROUP BY date
) x
WHERE $__timeFilter(d::timestamptz)
ORDER BY d

panels.title: Days Since Last Entry per Module

targets.rawSql:
SELECT 'meals' AS module,           MAX(date) AS last_entry, CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date::date) AS days_since FROM meals
UNION ALL SELECT 'sleep',            MAX(date), CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date::date) FROM sleep
UNION ALL SELECT 'spending',         MAX(date), CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date::date) FROM spending
UNION ALL SELECT 'hydration_log',    MAX(date), CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date::date) FROM hydration_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'supplements_log',  MAX(substr(taken_at,1,10)), CURRENT_DATE - MAX(substr(taken_at,1,10)::date) FROM supplements_log
UNION ALL SELECT 'steps',            MAX(date), CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date::date) FROM steps
UNION ALL SELECT 'gym_sessions',     MAX(date), CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date::date) FROM gym_sessions
UNION ALL SELECT 'body_composition', MAX(date_scanned), CURRENT_DATE - MAX(date_scanned::date) FROM body_composition
ORDER BY days_since DESC NULLS LAST
